name: my-marketplace
description: A Claude Code plugin marketplace for sharing and distributing plugins

plugins.name: http-github
plugins.description: Test plugin: evaluates whether Cowork loads a plugin-shipped .mcp.json that uses HTTP transport against GitHub's hosted MCP endpoint.

plugins.name: stdio-github
plugins.description: Test plugin: evaluates whether Cowork loads a plugin-shipped .mcp.json that uses stdio transport against a locally installed github-mcp-server binary.
